scripts.build: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/lsp run build && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/app run build && pnpm --filter ./packages/cli run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run test && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/app run test && pnpm --filter ./packages/cli run test && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/lsp run test && pnpm run test:scripts
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/core run test:coverage && pnpm --filter @karasu-tools/app run test:coverage && pnpm --filter ./packages/cli run test:coverage && pnpm run test:scripts
